title: Simple Heal
description: A simple yet highly configurable Spigot plugin to heal you
body:
# **Simple Heal** A simple yet highly configurable Spigot plugin to heal you **Supports:**
1.8.x
1.12.x
1.16-1.21.4 **Usage:**
/heal <playername> or /heal to use the command on yourself **Permissions:**
To use the heal command simpleheal.use
To reload the config simpleheal.reload
To bypass the cooldown simpleheal.bypasscooldown ## **Features** 1. Hightly customizable(see **config**) 2. Support for placeholders and custom colors in the config 3. Has a customizable command cooldown 4. Most importantly, it just works. Simply put the plugin in your plugins folder, restart the server, and it's ready without any configuration or bloat ## **Images** ![Heal message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6904f13f60eca5e03dcfcceb8e6efc18a08a2a91.png) ![Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a639984fb914b247b8ae849b2b20453f158dec.png)
